{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040246FD17704D9273B5646D92"}"},"total":1445},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6993231173581849344","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书书是我看过，相当不错的一本了，作者很有一套嘛，后面剧情只要不是只要不是太烂，并包吃文笔，我想会是一个非常不错的小说，所以说看网络小说不需要带脑子(›´ω`‹)但多少需要一些逻辑思维的吧？加油，好好写"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628238519,"group_id":"6989244377818205215","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一生清贫怎敢入繁华，两袖清风怎敢误佳人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5LtfnepIzGj7E7Se82ThhH0JbTmtEG7TvcaP5METBjs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c42506292c68475789c7694767cf8fe3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703927&x-signature=jknEEEZe17jreVlVI2BOkM2JYDM%3D","user_id":"3192580834861379","user_name":"暗语，随风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3192580834861379","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6989244377818205215","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒+穿越+无存在感系统+谋划】
穿越洪荒，成为第三千个人族，开局奖励洪荒版重瞳，一眼毁灭，一眼创造，成为截教首徒！
谋划后土身化轮回，分化巫族，改天婚对象让帝俊颜面尽失！
废老子人族圣师之位，还女娲造人因果，至此我人族当自立！
通天：自从收了这个徒弟之后，截教的事我就没操心过！
鸿钧：此子乃是我玄门未来希望！
天道：此子不除，我绝无超脱可能！
